raw:
{
  "verses": [
    {
      "n": 13,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Kad nu tas/ kam ta Pil-
lefchana irr/ no ṭawas Pillefcha-
nas schkihſtihts irr/ tad buhs tam
no ṭawas Schkihſtischanas ſep-
tix Deenas ſkaitiht / un ṭawas
Drehbes masgaht/ un ṭawu Mee-
fu ar tekkoti Uhdeni pehrt / tad
tas schkihſts buhs.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 14,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un aſtota Deenâ buhs
tam diwi Uhbeles/jeb diwi jaunus
Balloschus nemt/ un preeſch ta
KUNGÄ pee tahs Sa-eefchanas
Telts Durwin nahkt / un tehs
tam Preesteram doht.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 15,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un tam Preesteram buhs
tohs fataiſiht/ weenu par Greh-
fu-Uppuri / un weenu par De-
ſamn - Uppuri / ta buhs tam
Preesteram par winnu Salih-
dſinaschann darriht winna Pille-
ſchanas deht/ ta KUNGÄ
Preeſchä.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 16,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un ja no kahda Wibra
gulloht Sehkla iſtekk/ tad buhs
tam wiﬀu ṭawu Meeſu ar Uhde-
ni pehrt / un neſchkihſtam buht
lihds Wakkaram.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 17,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un wiﬀahm Drehbehin/un
wiﬀai Ahdai / us ko ta Sehkla
buhs/ tahm buhs ar Uhdeni maſ-
gatahm tapt / un neſchkihſtahm
buht lihds Wakkaram.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 18,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Ir tai Seetwai / pee ta
tahds Wihrē gulles / kam ta
Sehkla gulloht (ispill)/ buhs
"
    },
    {
      "n": 19,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Bet ja weena
Affins - Sahrneem ta
fas pill/ tad taps wi
Deenas attchſirta/ un
winnu aiſkarr buhs
lihds Wakkaram.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 20,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un wiſs tas/ u
na gull buhs neſchkihſt
us ko winna fehd buhs
"
    },
    {
      "n": 21,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un kas winnu
aiſkarr/ tam buhs fan
bes masgaht un ar Uh
tees/ un neſchkihſtam
Wakkaram.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 22,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Wiſſam arridſo
aiſkarr / us ko winnu
buhs ṭawas Drehbes
un ar Uhdeni pehrtee
schkihſtam buht lihds
Un ja fahds Trauksu
Sehdekli jeb Gulttu bi
kas to aiſkarr/ tam bul
ſtam buht lihds Wakk
"
    },
    {
      "n": 23,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Ir ja fahds
winnas gulleht gulleh
nas Neſchkihſtiba tam
buhs tam ſeptinas
schkihſtam buht/ un w
tai / kur winsh wirf-
buhs neſchkihſtai buht.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 24,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "In arridsan kat
dauds Deenas/ kad tai
nu Laiks ne irr / us
dabbn/ jeb kad winn-
ilgaki ſtahw/ tad buhs
ilgi/ famehr tee Sah-
irr / neſchkihſtai buht/
schā Sahran Laikā.
"
    }
  ],
  "confidence": "high",
  "notes": ""
}
